name: Forrest Barnwell-Hagemeyer (Personal)
subject: FWD: We are fighting back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
You’ve gotta watch this.
[](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-y/)

| |
---|---|---
| Wanted to make sure you saw our latest ad. We are striking back HARD against Bill Hagerty’s dishonest attacks on Dr. Manny. Hagerty is attacking Dr. Manny because he is trying to distract conservatives from the fact that Hagerty gave money to Mitt Romney and Al Gore, and made millions off Common Core. Hagerty has always been an establishment RINO, and he’s lying to Tennesseans about who he really is. Last week we told you we were tied. This week Hagerty is attacking us - why? Because we are surging and we are winning - but this latest attack means Hagerty and the establishment have their big guns aimed right at us. We need to fight back. **[Help us stand up to Bill Hagerty and the Establishment.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-j/)** FBH Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message -------
From: Chris Devaney, Campaign Manager
Date: July 15th, 2020
Subject: Bill Hagerty attacking Dr. Manny Friend, **Today, Bill Hagerty attacked Manny Sethi on statewide TV with a dishonest new ad. Why?** _**Because Dr. Manny is winning this race. **_ And friend, we’re not going to let up until we’ve won. **That’s why we’re getting the truth out with our own ad.** [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-t/)
Watch our new ad now [WATCH OUR NEW AD NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-i/) **Here’s the truth:** Bill Hagerty is attacking Dr. Manny and his wife for giving $50 to a family friend in grad school. _But Hagerty gave Mitt Romney $100,000 for President, endorsed Romney over Fred Thompson, gave money to Al Gore in 2000, and made millions off of Common Core._ [DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-d/) Hagerty is an establishment RINO - always has been. He’s lying about Dr. Manny. We’ve got to fight back. **[Will you donate to our “Fight Back Fund” and help us get our response ad out on the air?](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-h/)** Sincerely, Chris Devaney
Campaign Chairman
Dr. Manny for Senate P.S. Dr. Manny needs your help to get the truth out. Friend, I’ll be honest: we don’t have everything we need to stand up to them right now. Hagerty and the establishment have deep, deep pockets. But we have a grassroots movement - which means we’re counting on donors like you. **[Please, donate today.](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkdyljo-olhhkyhhid-k/)** Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Joe Biden
subject: When I think about climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I mean it when I say these aren't pie in the sky dreams. |
---
Peter --

When Donald Trump thinks about climate change, all he can muster is one word: "hoax."

**When I think about climate change, I think of a different word: "jobs."**

That's why this week, I announced my plan to create millions of infrastructure and clean energy jobs and create an equitable, clean energy future.

I mean it when I say these aren't pie in the sky dreams, Peter. These are actionable policies.

[**But we can't take action unless we win in November. Can you make your first contribution to make sure we have the resources to win in November and start creating millions of infrastructure and clean energy jobs?**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2") _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Click here to express donate $5 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&express_lane=true")

[Click here to donate another amount >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2")** Peter, if I have the honor of being elected President, we're not just going to tinker around the edges. We're going to make historic investments that will seize this opportunity and meet this moment in history.

These investments will be a win, win, win for this country: creating jobs, cutting energy costs, and tackling climate change.

I know this won't be an easy fight. But in the face of a health crisis, an economic crisis, and a climate crisis, I know that this is a fight we have to win.

So Peter, if you think it's time to create millions of high-quality, union jobs, rebuild our economy, and protect our planet, I need you with me in this fight.

[**Can I count on you to make your first donation to my campaign right now? Anything you're able to give today will make a real difference.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.18_B3_hoaxjobs_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2")

Thanks for all you do,

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7998/2556727183/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7997/2556727183/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7996/2556727183/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7995/2556727183/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7994/2556727183/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7993/2556727183/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7992/2556727183/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7991/2556727183/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7990/2556727183/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c798f/2556727183/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c7992/2556727183/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b837/1cd0ac28/8f38b68c/357c798d/2556727183/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Friend,

I just saw our new Trump-Reagan Commemorative Coin Sets and WOW, these coins are beautiful - I took one look and immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a set.

These aren’t any ordinary coins. They symbolize an important time in our Nation. This year, in addition to being re-elected as YOUR President, it also marks the 40th anniversary of our Nation’s 40th President, Ronald Reagan.

Unfortunately, we already sold out of the first batch we had in stock. But I liked these coins so much that I asked my team to rush order another batch for my TOP SUPPORTERS ONLY.

I’ve authorized a very limited production of these iconic coins, which is why I’m ONLY offering them to our top supporters, like YOU.

This offer is NOT available to the general public, so please, do NOT share this email with anyone.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=39825d693103ce2fa8cd6aa5e9bbcf2781f9e03102fda3b1b6bb5986e649efdc8d94c4f7f449c960ed813bfc8c6618488fb8fc232eb24073

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: “Cancel Culture” Warriors distorting reality, Citizens Fund endorsements, schools reopening, and more
disclaimer_text: paid for by former slaves and the statue memorializes emancipation
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20201-5e35a9a81e784f748814298c9bf869c9/79/956/e12a6d62-537f-45aa-8460-136920fb9b2d)** This past week we were proud to stand with Star Parker in defense of the Emancipation Memorial at her event, “Emancipation Celebration” on July 14th. As our nation continues to reopen and recover from the coronavirus pandemic, we are fighting hard to make sure our schools reopen in the fall.

We have continued to make the case that reopening our schools is not only pivotal for our students’ education and our nation's recovery, but that the science is on our side.

Thousands of doctors and scientists have come out against Dr. Anthony Fauci's insistence on continued lockdowns, citing a multitude of reasons. From pediatricians to researchers, their message is clear: we MUST reopen schools in the fall.

Now is a time for action, not continued lockdowns. We urge the President and the American people to ignore the fear mongering from the mainstream media and instead listen to the experts. As we continue to reopen America, we must insist on reopening our schools.

name: Sean Herring
subject: Re: Urgent deadline
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/oJGylNDrh5FFoDFnrnfC2KTPTYXAHM9GnfHsaKIvBsU=/3pU0MTX0En3ACMUn2HMTgfXo3Vk4ErwvMyScKOPnOWA=?refcode=071920)
| | Friend, I want to thank you for the outpouring of support we have received in the last 24 hours. The finance deadline is tomorrow evening. **Please consider making a contribution today. ** Your support allows us to hire field organizers, fund our voter outreach efforts, and combat Republican disinformation. [**Make a donation**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oJGylNDrh5FFoDFnrnfC2KTPTYXAHM9GnfHsaKIvBsU=/3pU0MTX0En3ACMUn2HMTgfXo3Vk4ErwvMyScKOPnOWA=?refcode=071920) Remember: Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and it will be refunded to them by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program. Thank you, **Sean Herring** Campaign Manager Minnesota House DFL Campaign \-------- Original Message -------- From: House DFL Team Date: Saturday, July 18, 2020 at 11:00 AM Subject: Urgent Deadline Friend, This weekend is a very big one for us: our next campaign finance deadline is this Monday. That means we need all hands on deck this weekend to reach our goal. [**_Would you make an investment in our campaign to protect and expand our majority today?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oJGylNDrh5FFoDFnrnfC2KTPTYXAHM9GnfHsaKIvBsU=/3pU0MTX0En3ACMUn2HMTgfXo3Vk4ErwvMyScKOPnOWA=?refcode=071920) Here's what we're up against:
* Donald Trump came within striking distance of winning Minnesota four years ago and is investing big already this year.
* Minnesota Republicans continue to downplay the significance of the COVID-19 pandemic as cases continue to rise.
* Republicans in the Minnesota Senate voted to end Governor Walz's peacetime emergency and if Republicans had control of the House, they would have.

name: Dem Senate Update
subject: Your Sunday Briefing: Georgia's Battleground Senate Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
**URGENT: "Loeffler [R-GA] has spent over _$10 million_ of her own money campaigning so far and has plans to _DOUBLE_ that amount by the election."**
This is bad, friend: Reverend Raphael Warnock (D) is being MASSIVELY outspent by his unelected Republican opponent, in a race that analysts at _The Washington Post_ say is key to deciding Senate control.
This SURGE in spending could tip the scales and hold us back - at a time when polls show Reverend Warnock and Sen. Kelly Loeffler neck and neck!

It's obvious why Loeffler is FLOODING this race with millions of her personal fortune, and why Mitch McConnell is lining up the full backing of the Republican establishment to support her. **Simply put, they're _terrified_ that McConnell's majority is in serious danger. **
We have a historic opportunity to elect Reverend Warnock as Georgia's first Black senator, flip Georgia blue and end Mitch McConnell's Senate majority once and for all - but ONLY if people like you step up, fight back and help us build _the strongest grassroots team possible_ _._
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can win in Georgia and take back the Senate, but we can't do it alone. With time running out, we're still falling $3,010 short of our goal and need you to rush your immediate grassroots support to get back on track: **

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Growing up in rural PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I had a great time riding Mimi last night at Hausman's Fruit Farm, it reminded me of growing up in rural Pennsylvania, where I learned that agriculture and farming are a pillar in the community here in #PA07 and across the state. I would have voted for the USMCA (United States, Mexico, Canada) agreement which reduced agriculture tariffs and allows us to send more of our goods overseas. We have about 450 farms in the Lehigh Valley and even if you don’t work on a farm, we all depend on farmers because they keep our economy strong and put food on our table. My main priorities when it comes to agriculture:
First, we need to open up new markets for American farmers. USMCA was a great start, but I want to make sure we can sell our products without tariffs to England, South Korea, and other countries. My business depends on exports around the world and I know that trade can be a big benefit to our farmers and means more jobs at home.
Second, we need to keep reducing regulations on farmers. The worst thing that could happen to farmers would be if liberals pass the Green New Deal that would cost every household in Eastern Pennsylvania $75,000 in its first year. And Susan Wild, despite pretending to be a moderate, called the Green New Deal “wonderful” and “exactly on point.” This would be the end for most Pennsylvania farmers. The Green New Deal would ban meat, stop air travel, double your taxes, and have the government take over everything. clean_body: I had a great time riding Mimi last night at Hausman's Fruit Farm, it reminded me of growing up in rural Pennsylvania, where I learned that agriculture and farming are a pillar in the community here in #PA07 and across the state. I would have voted for the USMCA (United States, Mexico, Canada) agreement which reduced agriculture tariffs and allows us to send more of our goods overseas. We have about 450 farms in the Lehigh Valley and even if you don’t work on a farm, we all depend on farmers because they keep our economy strong and put food on our table. My main priorities when it comes to agriculture: First, we need to open up new markets for American farmers. USMCA was a great start, but I want to make sure we can sell our products without tariffs to England, South Korea, and other countries. My business depends on exports around the world and I know that trade can be a big benefit to our farmers and means more jobs at home. Second, we need to keep reducing regulations on farmers. The worst thing that could happen to farmers would be if liberals pass the Green New Deal that would cost every household in Eastern Pennsylvania $75,000 in its first year. And Susan Wild, despite pretending to be a moderate, called the Green New Deal “wonderful” and “exactly on point.” This would be the end for most Pennsylvania farmers. The Green New Deal would ban meat, stop air travel, double your taxes, and have the government take over everything. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc.

body:
Our grassroots Beat Trump Fund is one of our most important tools in defeating Donald Trump. |
---
Peter,

Even as cases of COVID-19 spike across the country, Donald Trump continues to host in-person fundraisers to pad his war chest and fund his dishonest ad blitz -- including one last week in Florida, which is currently dealing with a sharp increase in cases.

Frankly, it's completely reckless that Trump is ignoring public health experts and carrying on with his in-person fundraising events -- but we know he'll do whatever he can to try and stop us from chipping away at his cash on hand advantage.

**Here 's the thing, though: We beat Donald Trump's fundraising machine two months in a row -- relying on virtual fundraising. But we'll have to keep our foot on the gas to keep up our pace and outraise him a third time.**

[**Peter, that 's why we're reaching out today. Our grassroots Beat Trump Fund is one of our most important tools in defeating Donald Trump, and we need to keep it filled for the battle ahead. It's going to be an expensive battle to win the 270 Electoral College votes we need to defeat Trump -- but grassroots support from folks like you have fueled this campaign from day one, and we wouldn't have it any other way.

With only a little over 100 days left until Election Day, we're charging full speed ahead to grow our campaign, put Joe's message in front of more voters, and execute our path to victory.

And by making a donation to our Beat Trump Fund -- our grassroots fund solely dedicated to making Donald Trump a one-term president -- you're helping to fund crucial early investments in battleground states we need to win in November.

**So we have to ask one more time, Peter. If you 're able, will you pitch in your first $5 for July to our Beat Trump Fund and fuel our work to elect Joe Biden?**

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Fishing and fighting for change
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Our team gave me a quick break to go fishing back home in Fleming Creek this weekend, and I got to support a great cause called Hope’s Wings while I was out at the creek.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18320980/224647653/-46754211?refcode=HIC_20200719_em_non_fishing_all_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFhZTM3Ny1mMmM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_L5e_vP7VKZG7VZKs_pNKcAboWjluAwnYw6Kknw0y70=)
| | Hey friend, Yesterday, I had the chance to do two things I love very much — fishing and fighting for a good cause. Our team gave me a quick break to go fishing back home in Fleming Creek this weekend, a place where I’ve spent many many hours with my dad and with friends. Let me tell you, enjoying some time outdoors and even catching a few fish were definitely the recharge I needed as we head into the final stretch of this campaign. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18320981/224647654/-1675915524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFhZTM3Ny1mMmM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_L5e_vP7VKZG7VZKs_pNKcAboWjluAwnYw6Kknw0y70=&emci=594be4f7-01c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=851ae377-f2c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=15601662)
---
**Believe it or not, this fishing trip was in support of a cause I care about:_[Hope’s Wings](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18320982/224647655/1975603407?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFhZTM3Ny1mMmM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_L5e_vP7VKZG7VZKs_pNKcAboWjluAwnYw6Kknw0y70=&emci=594be4f7-01c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=851ae377-f2c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=15601662)_**.
Hope’s Wings is a domestic violence prevention organization based out of Richmond, Kentucky, and this weekend was their annual “Fish-On” fundraiser. Normally, folks would gather in Richmond for this fishing tournament. However, this year in order to promote social distancing and public safety this great organization held this year’s event virtually.
I encountered too much domestic violence when I was a police officer and it left a lasting impression on me. We as a country have to work together to eliminate it.
Hope’s Wings is doing great work. They’re not only helping stabilize the lives of domestic violence survivors but they’re doing work in the community to prevent it.
It was my pleasure to do something fun for a cause that is extremely important, and I hope you will join me in supporting their work. Maybe I’ll even get a chance to do some more fishing for them. _**[You can find more information about Hope’s Wings, and make a contribution to support this important cause, here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18320983/224647656/-1675915524?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTFhZTM3Ny1mMmM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_L5e_vP7VKZG7VZKs_pNKcAboWjluAwnYw6Kknw0y70=&emci=594be4f7-01c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=851ae377-f2c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=15601662)**_.
\- Josh

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18321056/224657088/-940294256?ms=071920-es-100-days-out-vol&refcode=071920-es-100-days-out-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjBjZTNlMi1mNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6Nxg-8U15ucS7Tn61pc-Ni1ixn37Y50ZobPSeWABEU=&emci=7c0ce3e2-f5c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=7f0ce3e2-f5c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=9814644)

Hi there,

After a little more than a month on the job as Margaret’s field director, I’ll be honest — I'm a little tired, but that’s a good thing! That means we’re moving in the right direction, but there’s more work to be done — right from the comfort of your home! I’m busy planning our 100 Days Out Virtual Canvass, and I’m hoping you can help us make this our biggest volunteer event yet!

We’ve seen an outpouring of support for our campaign, from folks here on the Suncoast spanning across Florida and our nation making important calls to voters. They’re powering this important campaign, and I wanted to make sure you had the chance to be a part of it.

**[Click here to sign up to volunteer, and we will work with you to get you set up with everything you need to help us elect Margaret Good to Congress, so she can deliver the big, bold change we deserve.](https://www.mobilize.us/goodforcongress/)**

Volunteering your time is one of the most important gifts our campaign can receive, and it will make a real difference in the outcome of this critical election.

We need your help to contact voters to ensure they have all the information they need to cast their vote for Margaret this fall, or we risk losing control of the House and ending up with another term of Vern Buchanan’s failed leadership.

**We can’t let that happen, friend.**

It’s up to all of us to pitch in, make some calls, and do our part to help flip this seat and elect Margaret so she can deliver a brighter future to people here on the Suncoast and across our nation.

**[Please, if you have a moment to spare, sIgn up right now to give one of the greatest gifts our campaign can ask for — your time.](https://www.mobilize.us/goodforcongress/)**

We have a real chance at flipping this seat and helping Margaret deliver big, bold change to Florida and our nation, but we are running out of time and need your help! Let’s make the 100 Days Out Weekend of Action the biggest one yet!

Thank you for everything you do.

Emily Frost
Field Director
Margaret Good for Congress

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18321058/224657090/1073285021?refcode2=7f0ce3e2-f5c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emci=7c0ce3e2-f5c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=7f0ce3e2-f5c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ms=071920-es-100-days-out-vol&refcode=071920-es-100-days-out-vol&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjBjZTNlMi1mNWM5LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C6Nxg-8U15ucS7Tn61pc-Ni1ixn37Y50ZobPSeWABEU=)

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: we can't take our foot off the gas now, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
This is a tremendous win for our campaign, but now that our fundraising numbers are public, the special interests and dark money groups trying to buy our election are only going to double down in their efforts.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18321645/224687691/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.19_b1_ed_all-nd&refcode2=1381fa60-03ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzgxZmE2MC0wM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOlHPkABikX0WBsujwXIWnbzzfQVG6MIYHvBRqTPDoc=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Team,

**We just got word that this grassroots team outraised Scott Perry last quarter.**

This is a tremendous win for our campaign, but now that our fundraising numbers are public, the special interests and dark money groups trying to buy our election are only going to _double down_ in their efforts.

[**Bottom line: We can’t slow down for even a moment. name: Joe Biden HQ
subject: a powerful testament to the commitment of this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I've got some exciting news to share with all of our top supporters, including you. |
---
Peter,

I've got some exciting news to share with all of our top supporters, including you. [But first, if you can spare it, I hope you'll chip in $5 today to help fund the work to elect Joe Biden »](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.19_B2_cohtable_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.19_B2_cohtable_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Now, let me get right into it. Thanks to the tremendous support and commitment from this grassroots team, we have made significant headway into closing the fundraising lead that Donald Trump had built by the early months of 2020.

**Take a look for yourself, and know that this comeback was only made possible by folks just like you, who like me, are determined to make Donald Trump a one-term president and get this country back on track:** | | Cash on Hand After Q1 | Cash on Hand After Q2
---|---|---
TRUMP | $244M (+187) | $295M (+53)
BIDEN | $57M | $242M
That's right, Peter. We've made a dent of over $100 million into Donald Trump's cash-on-hand lead.

And here's the thing: I know those numbers sound crazy big and it's hard to put them in perspective. Because yes, we now have a lot of money to spend on winning this, and yes, despite that, Trump still has more.

But what these numbers tell me is that we have momentum that builds each month, and that if we closed a $100 million gap last month, we can close a $53 million gap this month.

And having as much money, and eventually, more money than Donald Trump means we can beat him on the airwaves in battleground states. It means we can talk to more voters in battleground states than he can. _It means we can win more battleground states than he can._

And this is all a powerful testament to the strength of this grassroots team. Over 97% of our campaign's funding comes from grassroots donors, and our average contribution in June was just $32.47.

**But, as you can see, there 's still more work to do. And if we can fully close this gap, we will have the resources to reach more voters over the next few months than Trump's campaign can, meaning a better shot at victory in November.**

[So, Peter, I have to ask. If you're in a position to do so, can you chip in your first $5 to make sure that our campaign can overtake Trump's lead in cash-on-hand and win the most important election of our lifetime?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.19_B2_cohtable_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.19_B2_cohtable_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks to you, Peter, we're doing what some thought would be impossible just a few months ago.

I'm so grateful for you, and because we all continue to dig deep and do our part, our country is going to be better off for it for generations to come.

Thank you. Let's keep the momentum going.

Jen O'Malley Dillon

clean_body: I've got some exciting news to share with all of our top supporters, including you. | Peter, I've got some exciting news to share with all of our top supporters, including you. "" Now, let me get right into it. Thanks to the tremendous support and commitment from this grassroots team, we have made significant headway into closing the fundraising lead that Donald Trump had built by the early months of 2020. Take a look for yourself, and know that this comeback was only made possible by folks just like you, who like me, are determined to make Donald Trump a one-term president and get this country back on track: | | Cash on Hand After Q1 | Cash on Hand After Q2 ---|---|--- TRUMP | $244M (+187) | $295M (+53) BIDEN | $57M | $242M That's right, Peter. We've made a dent of over $100 million into Donald Trump's cash-on-hand lead. And here's the thing: I know those numbers sound crazy big and it's hard to put them in perspective. Because yes, we now have a lot of money to spend on winning this, and yes, despite that, Trump still has more. But what these numbers tell me is that we have momentum that builds each month, and that if we closed a $100 million gap last month, we can close a $53 million gap this month. And having as much money, and eventually, more money than Donald Trump means we can beat him on the airwaves in battleground states. It means we can talk to more voters in battleground states than he can. It means we can win more battleground states than he can. And this is all a powerful testament to the strength of this grassroots team. Over 97% of our campaign's funding comes from grassroots donors, and our average contribution in June was just $32.47. But, as you can see, there 's still more work to do. And if we can fully close this gap, we will have the resources to reach more voters over the next few months than Trump's campaign can, meaning a better shot at victory in November. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks to you, Peter, we're doing what some thought would be impossible just a few months ago. I'm so grateful for you, and because we all continue to dig deep and do our part, our country is going to be better off for it for generations to come. Thank you. Let's keep the momentum going. Jen O'Malley Dillon Campaign Manager Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. body:
Two years ago, the Far Left created a massive fund in an attempt to buy my vote for 4 million dollars during the confirmation of Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh. As always, I stood my ground and did what was right. Peter,

Two years ago, the Far Left created a massive fund in an attempt to buy my vote for 4 million dollars during the confirmation of Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh. As always, I stood my ground and did what was right. I said it then and I will say it again: I cannot be bribed.

Next week, that same fund is going directly into the hands of my opponent. The fund is now over $4 MILLION.

Right now, my opponent continues to outraise my campaign. She has the support of Chuck Schumer and Far Left dark money interest groups from across the country. And once she is given this enormous pot of money, almost every dollar will go toward spreading false attacks about my record across Maine. We must do everything we can to be prepared for this.

body:
Sen. Cornyn voted 20 TIMES to repeal your health care. He needs to go.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee3/7f51f7bc/419ebd41/4ef657a4/3551587371/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

**_Sen. John Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA)._**

His attacks on the ACA were attempts to:
* **_Strip protections_** for Texans with pre-existing conditions
* **_Stop requiring insurers_** to cover essential services like treatment for cancer, diabetes, depression, and more
* Allow big insurance companies to **_discriminate against women_**
* _**Prevent young adults to stay on their parents ' insurance**_ until they're 26

**[We must beat Sen. Cornyn. Can you chip in just $20? That's $1 for every vote he's taken to decimate our health care. ](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee3/7f51f7bc/419ebd41/4ef6579b/3551587371/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200719.2nd__1725__&amount=10")**

When the pandemic struck, lo and behold, suddenly Sen. Cornyn changed his tune. He even said it's a "good thing" that Texans can receive coverage under the ACA -- as if we were going to forget how many times he tried to undo that coverage.

But if he _truly_ believed his own words, he'd stand up to **his political allies who are STILL trying to convince the Supreme Court to strike down the entire ACA.**

One thing is clear: Sen. John Cornyn needs to go -- and _we can replace him in only four months._

**[Donate $20 to elect MJ Hegar, defeat Sen. Cornyn, and flip the U.S. Senate! $20 = $1 for every vote Sen. clean_body: Sen. Cornyn voted 20 TIMES to repeal your health care. He needs to go. | "" | | Peter, Sen. John Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act (ACA). His attacks on the ACA were attempts to: Strip protections for Texans with pre-existing conditions Stop requiring insurers to cover essential services like treatment for cancer, diabetes, depression, and more Allow big insurance companies to discriminate against women Prevent young adults to stay on their parents ' insurance until they're 26 "" When the pandemic struck, lo and behold, suddenly Sen. Cornyn changed his tune. He even said it's a "good thing" that Texans can receive coverage under the ACA -- as if we were going to forget how many times he tried to undo that coverage. But if he truly believed his own words, he'd stand up to his political allies who are STILL trying to convince the Supreme Court to strike down the entire ACA. One thing is clear: Sen. John Cornyn needs to go -- and we can replace him in only four months. "" | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- Team MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. name: Vote-by-Mail Update
subject: Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams need YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The soul of our democracy is at stake.
| | |
---
Friend, the soul of our democracy is at stake - and we need to make sure every single voice is heard at the ballot box this November.
But Republicans are launching an all-out assault on voting rights across the country, attacking vote-by-mail and forcing Americans to choose between their health and their rights. **That's why Michelle Obama and Stacey Abrams are calling on YOU to help defend our right to vote before it's too late: **
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-vote-by-mail?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk384-su-nd")
This isn't just hypothetical, friend: With all the dirty voter-suppression tricks played in 2018, Stacey Abrams fell just _55,000_ votes short of winning her governor's race. We can't let history repeat itself - Democrats across the country have to speak out NOW.
**We need to hear from just 32 more Democrats in Georgia by midnight, but we're still missing your response. With the most important election of our lifetimes before us, please make your voice heard right now:**
| | **Will you stand with Stacey Abrams and Michelle Obama to demand universal vote-by-mail?**

subject: our momentum is strong and here’s the proof
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC just endorsed Eric’s re-election campaign — the first time since 2008 they’ve issued a gubernatorial... | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a962499b65d84be989de266c21a14582&_e=_SNeG2LfpDTgZQ9GSPXSdPSAR9Iv7GSkDV55c59-ViAARR5lyDsJIH4yurBhBrXy46kSaeRAqCjgGauQcg29HzM9OcRcMUnlRiGpGOux5y_omPJra2tgFwiNWcnEuzyiTf9qj3dXtn9lGO41iNZqjBvhRDEOLZNCNvI3Jhfx23q3-jAB2ublObJdOuLHNXZJPtQvnUG9AcUF7a2JOiooxlMLhl-9pfWxnSLVeaENXq1S0Dp4yOAP8X2HuAtG3nU0jaKyBqmjthZjeKDrz7ysrLVwI31z6s7uyGwy4mSkipndW2MgSC0j4PbsVvFsmdTsUXPrbAFH73p6diGTmaFzQmb4XlK40oWeZuBSEoqnem1XJDH67vkMmLxelMAL2hSBZVXt8hKufMPDjSUUAXYHyAyB5pR8fUUaVhY4SaaOqNr6QcYq0q3CmE4uNCMdgO--oQ4GQgMr1yXxqt3O0hAOgZ9vjcmzCBueEjoXLje-tmENjVBL8C_zHMJ7V1_XV8lU) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**We have GREAT news! **

The Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC just endorsed Eric’s re-election campaign — the first time they’ve issued a gubernatorial endorsement since 2008!
_**WHAT HOOSIER FIREFIGHTERS HAD TO SAY ABOUT ERIC**_
_“There’s no doubt that Governor Holcomb has always put the public safety of all Hoosiers first. He’s stood with Indiana firefighters as we stand with Hoosiers, focusing on education, training and safety standards, and retirement and disability benefits. We’re proud to call Governor Holcomb a friend of Hoosier firefighters, and know that he’s the right person to continue leading Indiana for the next four years.” - Thomas Hanify, President of the Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC_
[**Join them in endorsing Eric and donate**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a962499b65d84be989de266c21a14582&_e=_SNeG2LfpDTgZQ9GSPXSdPSAR9Iv7GSkDV55c59-ViAARR5lyDsJIH4yurBhBrXy46kSaeRAqCjgGauQcg29HzM9OcRcMUnlRiGpGOux5y_omPJra2tgFwiNWcnEuzyiTf9qj3dXtn9lGO41iNZqjBvhRDEOLZNCNvI3Jhfx23q3-jAB2ublObJdOuLHNXZJPtQvnUG9AcUF7a2JOiooxlMLhl-9pfWxnSLVeaENXq1S0Dp4yOAP8X2HuAtG3nU0jaKyBqmjthZjeKDrz7ysrJYW7xgBFdMpGW88vGbzeCmYff5_2p3Yz-sf2uUbtRkzUyp6mh4bQDaXki-2NjOXNDRzT_UgbNHMbCqrjAckt9zIi9ePqXVCZKCOq5X8cKr6lEj1QVO_AWYZRss3jvV1Y9LscEKUl3XN79wP9NKskMzlpyyzLMlBVg3ZfA-vA4kW8OZsTeetyp3qwRRRt-VvW39z_xJOzuVcQ33fVE-SlYzOyRpSOQpTGRkp88zyy5Kk)
They are the political arm of the Professional Fire Fighters Union of Indiana (PFFUI). The PFFUI represents 80 firefighter unions across the state and more than 7,800 members!

_We’re ecstatic to be supported by all of these Hoosier heroes. Eric has made health and safety a top priority, and the endorsement of these Indiana firefighters shows that our hard work is paying off. Firefighters across the state know they have a friend in their corner._
_**WHAT ERIC HAD TO SAY ABOUT OUR FIREFIGHTERS**_
_“Our Hoosier firefighters are the original essential workers. No matter the situation – whether it’s floods, tornados, blizzards, earthquakes, or a global pandemic – our firefighters are always there for us. I am profusely grateful for them and their support, and I’ll work to continue to earn that support every single day.” - Governor Eric Holcomb_
[**Endorse Eric and donate**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a962499b65d84be989de266c21a14582&_e=_SNeG2LfpDTgZQ9GSPXSdPSAR9Iv7GSkDV55c59-ViAARR5lyDsJIH4yurBhBrXy46kSaeRAqCjgGauQcg29HzM9OcRcMUnlRiGpGOux5y_omPJra2tgFwiNWcnEuzyiTf9qj3dXtn9lGO41iNZqjBvhRDEOLZNCNvI3Jhfx23q3-jAB2ublObJdOuLHNXZJPtQvnUG9AcUF7a2JOiooxlMLhl-9pfWxnSLVeaENXq1S0Dp4yOAP8X2HuAtG3nU0jaKyBqmjthZjeKDrz7ysrA3wEPdSJ3sun7d-sOuXIkMTOFg4Tajio_kj8GnEHtq5MSOoZ5z0O4ceSkebUW6_Y9nzkJwctR8IPu1-tBiqmn2aYXX9coqS0NsNW60SCg54skjoM8VYELv97MMXxWREiKj4sTA8asA1u-8yqIw-UHd35a1Ytms2MM6KmYDi_QGsNmKn_uDpyT8vy_rvH11QGnbPA7cJYmQgagg9qUvulJ6967MRg4ZZ90RwLNc2V0oc)
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a962499b65d84be989de266c21a14582&_e=_SNeG2LfpDTgZQ9GSPXSdPSAR9Iv7GSkDV55c59-ViAARR5lyDsJIH4yurBhBrXy46kSaeRAqCjgGauQcg29HzM9OcRcMUnlRiGpGOux5y_omPJra2tgFwiNWcnEuzyiTf9qj3dXtn9lGO41iNZqjBvhRDEOLZNCNvI3Jhfx23q3-jAB2ublObJdOuLHNXZJPtQvnUG9AcUF7a2JOiooxlMLhl-9pfWxnSLVeaENXq1S0Dp4yOAP8X2HuAtG3nU0jaKyBqmjthZjeKDrz7ysrAt6KL3P3OXAMoDtlAY8h7KyUHs7-BwnAIcVrH8nQ0yBM9Or5rU91BKqfAEiEkX165aaLAF6Q07FviaAQr0O5OxnVWgxUPqpgXgLDTbLua_sUg3f7WVYQITnRrBbWxaCAjY3UQr2fWY-tPEmMVAdRyftjKvjC-6UaJhF0pUZOOuLLDMy5JB5wHO7vL3GMSAVJt2lpq6DjJE2E1Il3nEZQeR45QtQeAPB_g99K5SpZnPd)
Friend, our momentum is strong as we enter this stretch of our campaign.

The Indiana Professional Firefighters PAC is the seventh group to endorse Eric, and Hoosiers across our state are rallying to his call to build One Indiana.

_But we can’t take anything for granted. We need to keep our foot on the gas if we want to re-elect Eric and continue to build on our success. _

_Can we count on you to join Indiana’s firefighters in endorsing Eric and donate to our campaign today? Use the button below!_
[**Endorse Eric and donate**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a962499b65d84be989de266c21a14582&_e=_SNeG2LfpDTgZQ9GSPXSdPSAR9Iv7GSkDV55c59-ViAARR5lyDsJIH4yurBhBrXy46kSaeRAqCjgGauQcg29HzM9OcRcMUnlRiGpGOux5y_omPJra2tgFwiNWcnEuzyiTf9qj3dXtn9lGO41iNZqjBvhRDEOLZNCNvI3Jhfx23q3-jAB2ublObJdOuLHNXZJPtQvnUG9AcUF7a2JOiooxlMLhl-9pfWxnSLVeaENXq1S0Dp4yOAP8X2HuAtG3nU0jaKyBqmjthZjeKDrz7ysrOG5oA_b6f0JR6ReWjoBb7McV5EhhUa1pm2S-WiAnSqLGW-NkrElcHlc6BXBNV10vuqKUpt0udJ4bkbAVdr5OOYBS-qeobs7TdC6VTCeLdn5qaEPBIivptPYIYbnOie6wwMAnlW6o8yx8zmyncXpCoqpDkbLz_knRzlo_CGHrhsK2-Bnmg1VE5bM0Zoinm-Qixs3D_WetLaNHB96BId77onHn_Ee39jWKUQdAoRTRdSY)
Thank you for everything you do.

Regards,
-Your Holcomb Crew

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: We want to know what you think
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
As one of our top supporters in Indiana, we want to know what you think as we head into the 2020 elections. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469542?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=cee255a3c7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

We don’t think anyone can deny it – 2020 hasn’t been what we expected.

This pandemic has taken its toll on all of us and that’s layered on top of conversations on important topics on race that have the attention of all Hoosiers.

There’s a lot going on right now. With these issues at play, this November’s election is slated to be one of the most important in our nation’s history.

You’ve been identified as one of our top Indiana GOP supporters. As a Hoosier who is actively involved in the political process, we want to get a read on where your thoughts are.

**Will you take just a minute of your time to fill out our 2020 election survey?**
---
| [Take the survey! >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3afdd0caf2&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Take the survey! >>")
---
| It’s important for us to know what’s important to YOU as we support our entire Republican team across Indiana.

**Are you concerned with the economy, or providing health resources to continue fighting COVID-19? Bringing jobs back from China, or balancing the national debt? Something else?**

It only takes a minute or two to respond, and it really helps us out so much!

Thanks for your time and input.

\- Indiana Republican Party
---
| [Take the survey! >>](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e6c248d232&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Take the survey! >>")

name: Amy Kennedy
subject: Betsy DeVos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
Hello, I’m a former public school teacher and a mother of five. So when I saw that Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos said she would consider holding federal school funding hostage in order to force schools to bring kids back into their classrooms this fall, I was appalled. **Decisions on whether to re-open classroom doors this fall should be guided by public health experts and the science of this disease.** Our leaders got us into this mess by ignoring the science and failing to follow public health recommendations. We shouldn’t make the same mistake twice. But instead of standing up for our educators, students, and families, our Congressman Jeff Van Drew has been silent. **[I’m running for Congress because we deserve leadership that will put the safety of our kids ahead of politics. If you agree school reopenings should be driven by science, not partisan politics, add your name to our petition now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322218/224720917/1003308381?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjZiYmM3OS0xMWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-p-X0hd_5Owv3oWWtXZ7gDXwJYbXJ05bwg-s12KS9E=&emci=e9f793a9-2cc9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=466bbc79-11ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=19577462)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322219/224720918/1003308381?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjZiYmM3OS0xMWNhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6-p-X0hd_5Owv3oWWtXZ7gDXwJYbXJ05bwg-s12KS9E=&emci=e9f793a9-2cc9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=466bbc79-11ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=19577462)
---
The entire school community -- from educators and janitors to parents and students -- needs our support right now.
Thank you for raising your voice today to protect our kids. Together, we’ll send spineless politicians like Jeff Van Drew home for good this November.
— Amy
Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress

clean_body: | Hello, I’m a former public school teacher and a mother of five. So when I saw that Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos said she would consider holding federal school funding hostage in order to force schools to bring kids back into their classrooms this fall, I was appalled. Decisions on whether to re-open classroom doors this fall should be guided by public health experts and the science of this disease. Our leaders got us into this mess by ignoring the science and failing to follow public health recommendations. We shouldn’t make the same mistake twice. But instead of standing up for our educators, students, and families, our Congressman Jeff Van Drew has been silent. | The entire school community -- from educators and janitors to parents and students -- needs our support right now. Thank you for raising your voice today to protect our kids. Together, we’ll send spineless politicians like Jeff Van Drew home for good this November. — Amy Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress Amy Kennedy for Congress P.O. Box 247 Brigantine, NJ 08203 United States

name: The Lumineers
subject: Let’s talk about the future of concerts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322330/224722044/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM2N2U5NS0xM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpP3zs4yawh93n5Ngt58b9xl4nJaL_9jCOxmIHbCQEQ=)
| | Hey,

Wesley and Jeremiah of The Lumineers here. For those of you who might not know us, we’re a band from Denver. Prior to COVID-19, we were in the middle of a worldwide tour, playing in sold out arenas.

But before the arenas and amphitheaters were an option, we had to cut our teeth in small, hole in the wall, independent venues — places that have been closed for months because of COVID-19.

These rooms are the foundation to developing your career as an artist.

[When the pandemic hit, these theatres and concert halls were the first to close and will be the last to reopen. Unless Congress takes action, up to 90% of independent music venues could close permanently over the next next few months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322331/224722045/356331855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM2N2U5NS0xM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpP3zs4yawh93n5Ngt58b9xl4nJaL_9jCOxmIHbCQEQ=&emci=3ac195ec-e9c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec67e95-13ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

That’s why we’re emailing you now. This week, we met up with Michael at the Boulder Theater to support the RESTART Act, his bipartisan bill to support small businesses hit hardest by the pandemic – like independent music venues – and the artists who rely on them.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322332/224722046/356331855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM2N2U5NS0xM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpP3zs4yawh93n5Ngt58b9xl4nJaL_9jCOxmIHbCQEQ=&emci=3ac195ec-e9c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec67e95-13ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)
It’s not just the artists who are affected. Bartenders, technicians, studio professionals, promoters and more will be economically devastated by these closures.

[If we want to save the future of concerts, we need to act now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322333/224722047/356331855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM2N2U5NS0xM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpP3zs4yawh93n5Ngt58b9xl4nJaL_9jCOxmIHbCQEQ=&emci=3ac195ec-e9c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec67e95-13ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

[Will you join us to save our stages by becoming a citizen cosponsor of the RESTART Act? Click below to add your name and stand with hundreds of small businesses around the country who need this relief now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322334/224722048/356331855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM2N2U5NS0xM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpP3zs4yawh93n5Ngt58b9xl4nJaL_9jCOxmIHbCQEQ=&emci=3ac195ec-e9c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec67e95-13ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)
---
| | [ADD MY NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322335/224722049/356331855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWM2N2U5NS0xM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IpP3zs4yawh93n5Ngt58b9xl4nJaL_9jCOxmIHbCQEQ=&emci=3ac195ec-e9c9-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2ec67e95-13ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=1295540)

Once you do, be sure to spread the word on social media with the hashtag #SaveOurStages!

Best,

Wesley Schultz and Jeremiah Fraites
The Lumineers

name: Nick Freitas
subject: Courage in Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, It takes courage to do the right thing in Washington. But it takes a lot of nerve to tell voters you’re going to be a “moderate” like candidate Abigail Spanberger did in 2018, and then vote with **Adam Schiff, Ilhan Omar, and Nancy Pelosi over 91% of the time.** A record like Congresswoman Spanberger’s isn't courageous -- _it’s cowardly._ I served our nation overseas fighting on the front lines, and now I’ll stand up to liberal politicians in Washington and take on the socialist agenda. The fight for America has come to Virginia’s 7th District. **Our race will be the biggest House race of 2020.** Friend, **_will you help us win it? We created the Fight for Freitas Fund -- we need 1,000 donors before FRIDAY to stay on track for taking back the House._** [**Rush in clean_body: Friend, It takes courage to do the right thing in Washington. But it takes a lot of nerve to tell voters you’re going to be a “moderate” like candidate Abigail Spanberger did in 2018, and then vote with Adam Schiff, Ilhan Omar, and Nancy Pelosi over 91% of the time. A record like Congresswoman Spanberger’s isn't courageous -- it’s cowardly. I served our nation overseas fighting on the front lines, and now I’ll stand up to liberal politicians in Washington and take on the socialist agenda. The fight for America has come to Virginia’s 7th District. Our race will be the biggest House race of 2020. Friend, will you help us win it? We created the Fight for Freitas Fund -- we need 1,000 donors before FRIDAY to stay on track for taking back the House. I’m going to stand up to Spanberger and confront her on her record, which is bad for Virginians. While Spanberger supports healthcare for illegals, the Green New Deal, and taxpayer-funded partisan witch-hunts, I support the Constitution, the free-market economy, and the rule of law. I’ll get our federal government under control, support President Trump, and legislate on behalf of Virginians -- not socialists. Friend, I need your help to fend off the MILLIONS of New York, Hollywood, and Pelosi elite donors who are pouring money into our district. Your ally in the fight for America, Nick Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: The culture war is here. Which side are you on?
body:
Peter,
We’ve watched it simmer for quite some time, but in 2020 the culture war has truly arrived.
It’s between those who believe we’re an imperfect but great nation built upon virtuous principles and those who look at Mt. Rushmore and see slave-owning colonizers worthy of our scorn.
It’s between those who believe in free and open debate and the Orwellian thought police who demand absolute loyalty under the threat of public humiliation and personal ruin.
It’s between those who believe that all American lives matter \-- regardless of color -- and those who disingenuously use race as a political weapon to intimidate and establish socialism.
It’s between those who respect the sanctity of life, and those who encourage women to “shout your abortion” as a positive good while dismantling any and all protections for the unborn.
During my time in politics, there was usually an honest effort to find common ground. My how times have changed.
**I don’t know exactly how we got to this moment in America, but I know we must win.**
To do so, men and women of faith who believe we must recenter this nation around the biblical values must be informed, engaged, and relentless.
[The key organization on the front lines of recruiting, informing, and mobilizing millions of Christian voters in 2020 for all 100,000 elections across America is My Faith Votes -- and I strongly encourage you to support them with a tax-deductible donation today](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200719apl01&n=1).
If you’re wondering if getting involved in this way really matters, let me tell you this.
For all there is to be angry about, remember that in the last few years we’ve confirmed a whole new generation of conservative jurists who believe in protecting life and religious liberty.
Well, if My Faith Votes had not recruited and driven millions of Christians to the polls in 2016, this may not have happened. And 2020 is even more crucial.
To prepare, we are activating 1 million new Christian voters in 11 swing states, equipping our youth on 300 Christian college and university campuses, and deploying an online voter guide for all 100,000 elections happening across the country in November because not everything that matters happens in Washington, D.C.
So my question for you is this -- if you agree that the soul of this nation is at stake, will you help ensure that the right side comes out on top? There is no guarantee and it’s not just about one election, but if we don’t get organized and active we will not have a fighting chance.
We are up against a very loud and angry mob, powerful corporations who’ve surrendered their boardrooms to “woke” identity politics, and a propaganda-driven media that does everything but tell the truth.
On our side, we have you and people like you. Free citizens who believe in this country and live by the Judeo-Christian values it was built upon.
[I ask you to donate to My Faith Votes right now because they understand the stakes and most importantly, they are effective](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200719apl01&n=2).
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200716apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200719apl01&n=3)
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200719apl01&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes

subject: Lee's Newsletter
body:
Hi everyone, This has been another week of highs and lows. I was heartbroken to hear we lost civil rights leaders Reverend C.T. Vivian and R
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/77NDeYpi3/c?w=FhLb2J_8prOn36zmOeoj2I78jzQxCZ-RU_1ANf8LuCk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby83N05EZVlwaTMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)
---
| | | | Lee's Newsletter - July 19th
---
| | Hi everyone, This has been another week of highs and lows. I was heartbroken to hear we lost civil rights leaders Reverend C.T. Vivian and Representative John Lewis on Friday. Both men, who worked alongside Dr. Martin Luther King, leave behind inspiring legacies of character and courage. I was hoping I'd get to meet John Lewis as a fellow congressman and personally thank him for everything he has done to make this a better, more just country. He spent his whole life fighting for justice and equality, and for 33 years he brought that fight to Congress, and his life and his words have been a huge inspiration to me. Unbelievably, on Saturday a group of neo-Nazis rallied in Williamsport's Brandon Park, armed with assault rifles and waving flags that combined swastikas with the American flag. My grandparents served in World War II, and the fact that neo-Nazis now feel impunity to parade our streets is an insult to their service and the sacrifices of their generation. These displays of hate and intolerance do not represent the country that my grandparents fought for and that I was raised to love. Also earlier in the week, Education Secretary Betsy DeVos confirmed that the administration does not have a plan for how schools can return to in-person instruction, while insisting that they must reopen in the fall. This continues the infuriating lack of preparation the White House has demonstrated throughout this entire pandemic. Illnesses spread incredibly quickly in schools, as we've seen with the flu and other infections, and our already under-funded local schools cannot be expected to come up with their own plans for safely reopening. I was on a call with the National Education Association (NEA) this past week, and there are a number of conditions and protocols that need to be in place for a safe return to in-person instruction. Our schools need support and guidance from the federal government, including funding to put in place the measures necessary. The White House has also instructed hospitals to report COVID-19 data to the Department of Health and Human Services instead of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). The administration's erratic response to the pandemic has been difficult enough for healthcare providers to follow already. This new change is likely to cause more confusion, and appears to be motivated by the ongoing disputes between the President and the CDC. This is just another in a string of ill-advised, politically motivated actions as demonstrated by the decision to pull out of the World Health Organization (WHO) who the administration has tried to blame for the poor response to the pandemic. The WHO decision has broader implications as tensions grow between the U.S. and China. Participating in international organizations like the WHO is a way for America to curb China's increasing influence on other countries. One piece of good news this week was that the White House reversed its position and will allow international students to stay in the country while taking online-only classes. This is a relief to students who can continue to focus on their education, as well as educators and universities who, already challenged with planning for the fall semester, can focus on health and safety without the worry of losing students. This week I had the pleasure of joining several virtual calls as part of the PA Dems State Committee meeting, including the Rural, LGBT, Veterans, Seniors, Young Dems and Women's Caucuses. Meeting with these inspirational local and state leaders renewed my faith in democracy and the future of our government. I also kicked off my 15 county virtual tour of PA-12 with Juniata County voters on Tuesday. We covered a range of topics including healthcare, executive authority and the changing global political landscape. I want to thank all the participants for an energizing conversation, and I look forward to many more. The tour continues this week with Lycoming County on Tuesday 7/21 at 7pm and Sullivan County on Wednesday 7/22 at 6pm. Please sign up for your county's event [here](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/77NDeYpi3/c?w=HJy3NxL7v_Yn77rlGHpwIM7A9uBzxgoBjB0d1c1nQzE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aW55dXJsLmNvbS95OHB4eWs2NCIsInIiOiJiNGM4ZDAzZi02N2EyLTRjYTUtNjVhNC0zY2VkY2ZhMTg4MTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ) \- I hope to see you at one soon! I want to leave you this week with some encouraging words from Rep. John Lewis. His tweet from 2018 is poignantly relevant in light of his passing and this week's events: "Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble." I hope we all find comfort and strength in his legacy and his words as we carry on our fight for democracy in his absence.
Lee

clean_body: Hi everyone, This has been another week of highs and lows. I was heartbroken to hear we lost civil rights leaders Reverend C.T. Vivian and R | | | | | | Lee's Newsletter - July 19th | | Hi everyone, This has been another week of highs and lows. I was heartbroken to hear we lost civil rights leaders Reverend C.T. Vivian and Representative John Lewis on Friday. Both men, who worked alongside Dr. Martin Luther King, leave behind inspiring legacies of character and courage. I was hoping I'd get to meet John Lewis as a fellow congressman and personally thank him for everything he has done to make this a better, more just country. He spent his whole life fighting for justice and equality, and for 33 years he brought that fight to Congress, and his life and his words have been a huge inspiration to me. Unbelievably, on Saturday a group of neo-Nazis rallied in Williamsport's Brandon Park, armed with assault rifles and waving flags that combined swastikas with the American flag. My grandparents served in World War II, and the fact that neo-Nazis now feel impunity to parade our streets is an insult to their service and the sacrifices of their generation. These displays of hate and intolerance do not represent the country that my grandparents fought for and that I was raised to love. Also earlier in the week, Education Secretary Betsy DeVos confirmed that the administration does not have a plan for how schools can return to in-person instruction, while insisting that they must reopen in the fall. This continues the infuriating lack of preparation the White House has demonstrated throughout this entire pandemic. Illnesses spread incredibly quickly in schools, as we've seen with the flu and other infections, and our already under-funded local schools cannot be expected to come up with their own plans for safely reopening. I was on a call with the National Education Association (NEA) this past week, and there are a number of conditions and protocols that need to be in place for a safe return to in-person instruction. Our schools need support and guidance from the federal government, including funding to put in place the measures necessary. The White House has also instructed hospitals to report COVID-19 data to the Department of Health and Human Services instead of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC). The administration's erratic response to the pandemic has been difficult enough for healthcare providers to follow already. This new change is likely to cause more confusion, and appears to be motivated by the ongoing disputes between the President and the CDC. This is just another in a string of ill-advised, politically motivated actions as demonstrated by the decision to pull out of the World Health Organization (WHO) who the administration has tried to blame for the poor response to the pandemic. The WHO decision has broader implications as tensions grow between the U.S. and China. Participating in international organizations like the WHO is a way for America to curb China's increasing influence on other countries. One piece of good news this week was that the White House reversed its position and will allow international students to stay in the country while taking online-only classes. This is a relief to students who can continue to focus on their education, as well as educators and universities who, already challenged with planning for the fall semester, can focus on health and safety without the worry of losing students. This week I had the pleasure of joining several virtual calls as part of the PA Dems State Committee meeting, including the Rural, LGBT, Veterans, Seniors, Young Dems and Women's Caucuses. Meeting with these inspirational local and state leaders renewed my faith in democracy and the future of our government. I also kicked off my 15 county virtual tour of PA-12 with Juniata County voters on Tuesday. We covered a range of topics including healthcare, executive authority and the changing global political landscape. I want to thank all the participants for an energizing conversation, and I look forward to many more. The tour continues this week with Lycoming County on Tuesday 7/21 at 7pm and Sullivan County on Wednesday 7/22 at 6pm. Please sign up for your county's event \- I hope to see you at one soon! I want to leave you this week with some encouraging words from Rep. John Lewis. His tweet from 2018 is poignantly relevant in light of his passing and this week's events: "Do not get lost in a sea of despair. Be hopeful, be optimistic. Our struggle is not the struggle of a day, a week, a month, or a year, it is the struggle of a lifetime. Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble." I hope we all find comfort and strength in his legacy and his words as we carry on our fight for democracy in his absence. Lee | | | | Share Via: | | |

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18322722/224755351/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGM3Y2RkMi0yM2NhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zxZxZzFpcT7VDLt8Xc4dz4JZEOSwg49kxY_zE_Vpxxc=&emci=fcc7cdd2-23ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=fdc7cdd2-23ca-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Georgia and Mississippi both contain a significant percentage of Black voters, yet neither state has elected a Black senator since Reconstruction. **My brother, Reverend Warnock, and I plan to change that this November. ** We believe that a new chapter of Georgia and Mississippi’s history, one where all are represented and feel welcome, is beginning. We believe that the people in our states deserve access to affordable health care, should receive a great public education, and should be able to march to the polls without having their vote suppressed. **We also believe that two Black men from Georgia and Mississippi can become U.S Senators and unite people who are tired of elected leaders holding our states back.**

Reverend Warnock and I are both challenging opponents who have the support of far-right mega-donors, special interests, and friends like Mitch McConnell. Meanwhile in Georgia and Mississippi, we’re counting on grassroots support to make the impossible happen. **Will you help accomplish what we know is possible — electing two Black men to the U.S. Senate — by splitting a contribution of $10 or more to our campaigns today? clean_body: | Georgia and Mississippi both contain a significant percentage of Black voters, yet neither state has elected a Black senator since Reconstruction. My brother, Reverend Warnock, and I plan to change that this November. We believe that a new chapter of Georgia and Mississippi’s history, one where all are represented and feel welcome, is beginning. We believe that the people in our states deserve access to affordable health care, should receive a great public education, and should be able to march to the polls without having their vote suppressed. We also believe that two Black men from Georgia and Mississippi can become U.S Senators and unite people who are tired of elected leaders holding our states back. Reverend Warnock and I are both challenging opponents who have the support of far-right mega-donors, special interests, and friends like Mitch McConnell. Meanwhile in Georgia and Mississippi, we’re counting on grassroots support to make the impossible happen. Will you help accomplish what we know is possible — electing two Black men to the U.S. Senate — by splitting a contribution of $10 or more to our campaigns today? Every donation helps our campaigns move closer to our goal of defeating Kelly Loeffler and Cindy Hyde-Smith this November. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With people like you supporting us, history will be made this November. Thank you for believing in us and deciding to be a part of it. Thanks for all you do. — Mike Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

We've got a plan to end Trumpism FOREVER. We're making historic investments in Senate and House races across this country to send a message that the Trump era is OVER.

name: MJ Hegar for TX Survey Team
subject: Sen. John Cornyn Focus Group
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We want to know what you think about Sen. Cornyn's record.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef6578f/2380095432/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef6578e/2380095432/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-focus-group-pr")
---
Peter,

Sen. John Cornyn has spent nearly 20 years in Washington putting special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell ahead of working Texans. From voting 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act to dragging his feet on coronavirus relief, we can list dozens of ways Sen. Cornyn has failed the people of Texas -- **but we want to know what you think, too.**

We're putting together a focus group to hear from voters about why you think it's important to defeat him this November, and **you 've been selected to participate!** There are just a few questions, and they won't take long to complete.

**[Click here to join the focus group now. It'll take just 5 minutes, and your input will be incredibly valuable as we work to defeat Sen. Cornyn and flip the Senate this November!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef6578e/2380095432/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-focus-group-pr")**
**[JOIN THE FOCUS GROUP NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef6578e/2380095432/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://mjfortexas.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/mj-focus-group-pr")**
Thanks,
Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef6578d/2380095432/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200719.3__1753__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef6578c/2380095432/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3NTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1753&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ee2/7f51f7bc/41939632/4ef65783/2380095432/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: 4 weeks left.. you can help me win!
body:
I need your help.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ryanchamberlin.com/4-weeks-left-you-can-help-me-win?e=d703fa4981)
---
| | [ ](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=abaf8b6f29&e=d703fa4981)
---
| |
# Please read carefully...

We are coming down to the last 4 weeks. And it’s time to ask for something NEW.

The purpose of this email however is to LAUNCH the **_DIAL FOR RYAN - Phone Banking Crusade - _**Click here to Register - [https://dialforryan.eventbrite.com](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=017c068c8c&e=d703fa4981)

If you can - join Jenny and I at our home on TUESDAY night (unless you are sick :)

If you can't come to our home, you can do this from anywhere!

Please note: We are launching Tuesday, but will continue to dial over the next several weeks :)

**OUR GOAL - Dial 10,000 phones numbers** and either leave a message (most of them), or speak to likely voters about Ryan Chamberlin for Congress.

(Just 100 people dialing 100 numbers or 50 people dialing 200 and we have it!)

__Yes - from an air-conditioned room you can help Ryan win!__

We launch this on Tuesday night live from the Chamberlin’s home where we will Dial for Ryan as a group. If you can’t make it to the Chamberlin’s house then register anyway and we will get you everything you need to help from where you are at. You can literally help from anywhere

Click here to Register - [https://dialforryan.eventbrite.com](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=a2e87fba7c&e=d703fa4981)

After you register we will send you details about Tuesday night and/or how to help from wherever. Jeff Billingsley, our Canvassing/PhoneBanking coordinator will be available for any questions you might have. Here is his cell if you need it - (352) 572-6032‬

Thank you in advance for all you help,

P.S. Please continue to help Canvass when you can. We will be continuing to Canvass MARION and other counties daily.

Ryan
---
| | | | | | | [](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=b5348da04c&e=d703fa4981)
---
| | [](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=e44e5acb4f&e=d703fa4981)
---
| | [](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=e1c0faa25f&e=d703fa4981)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Ryan Chamberlin for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for Congress12305 SE 55th Avenue RdBelleview, FL 34420-5121
[Add us to your address book](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=229dcb40e7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=229dcb40e7&e=d703fa4981) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://RyanChamberlin.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c569a54b3f37812eca5e09c5a&id=229dcb40e7&e=d703fa4981&c=da0ca1fada).
